metadata.description: Shiny specular shader - maps to smooth metallic in Unity

summary: Glossy surface with specular highlights. Unity: use metallic or high smoothness non-metallic material.

parameters.Color: Specular color (often white or slightly tinted)
parameters.Distribution: Highlight distribution type (GGX, Beckmann, Ashikhmin-Shirley, Multiscatter)

compatibility_loss_30_percent: Different BRDF models; visual match good but not identical, especially in extreme angles
